final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input [7:0] A,
  input [7:0] B,
  output reg [7:0] Y
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (A < B) begin
      Y <= 8'b0;
    end else begin
      Y <= A - B;
    end
  end
  
endmodule
